/usr/bin/c++ -O3 CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/Kyber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/KPKE.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/MLKEM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/PolyRing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/Poly.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/PolyCoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/PolyMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kyber.dir/PolyVector.cpp.o -o Kyber  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/openssl-3.6/lib64 /opt/openssl-3.6/lib64/libcrypto.so
